svg.text: A survey-native browser for 2MRS and DESI DR1 spectroscopic catalogues
DESI DR1 LSS footprint + 2MRS nearby anchor
Footprint, targeting and selection remain visible.
The browser is not a density-field
Full catalogue delivery and interaction path
• Full DESI GPU cloud in the browser
• Survey footprint is part of the data context
• Display sample differs from GPU-resident rows
• Figures for redshift and sky/voxel tests
DESI DR1 LSS Catalogues | 2MRS Redshift Survey | Software: Python · Three.js · WebGL
